title: GroupMembership
description: Link between an individual and a group (household). Backed by the Odoo model `g2p.group.membership`. Returned by `getGroupMembers`, and written to by `addToGroup` / `removeFromGroup`.

individual.description: Many2one reference `[id, name]` to the individual `res.partner`.

kind.description: Many2many reference to membership roles (e.g. `Head`, ordinary member). Returned as a list of Odoo ids.

start_date.description: Date the individual joined the group.

ended_date.description: Date the individual left the group, if applicable.

individual_birthdate.description: Convenience field: birthdate of the linked individual.

individual_gender.description: Convenience field: gender of the linked individual.
